person.name: John de Thornhill
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»

«b»Marriage«/b»
John de Thornhull married Olivia Mare or Olive de la Mare.

«b»Sons Transfer Land«/b»
In 1227 his son Walter grants an estate to Walter's brother Ralph. This presumes Walter had achieved majority by the time. Therefore Walter's birth is estimated as, say, 1205.

In 1227, Walter granted his brother Ralph the estate of Alveston Manor, and estate which later appears among the Fauntelroy estates. 

«b»Death«/b»
He died in 1249 in Fixby Hall.

«b»Issue«/b»
1.) John de Thornhill, b. ca. 1230 

2.) Simon de Thornhill, b. ca. 1232 d. 1270

3.) Sarah de Thornhill

4.) Richard de Thornhill, b.1228 at Thornhill, died 1287

zh.lifeSummary: John de Thornhill是Richard de Thornhill的兒子，於1180年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾。他於1227年與Olivia Mare在英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1249年在英國越可爾德斯費爾德享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John de Thornhill是Richard de Thornhill的儿子，于1180年出生在英国英格兰越可爾恩爾。他于1227年与Olivia Mare在英国英格兰越可爾恩爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1249年在英国越可爾德斯費爾德享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thornhill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Thornhill, for example in Derbyshire, Yorkshire, Dorset, and Wiltshire, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Thornell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’, + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: John de Thornhill was born in 1180, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Richard de Thornhill. He married Olivia Mare in 1227, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1249, in Huddersfield, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: John de Thornhill est né en 1180, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Richard de Thornhill. Il a épousé Olivia Mare en 1227, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1249, à Huddersfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John de Thornhill wurde 1180 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Richard de Thornhill geboren. Er hat 1227 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Olivia Mare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1249 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Huddersfield, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: John de Thornhill è nato il nel 1180 nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Richard de Thornhill. Lui sposato Olivia Mare nel 1227, nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1249, nel Huddersfield, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Thornhillは1180年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルでRichard de Thornhillの息子として生まれた。1227年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルでOlivia Mareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1249年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハッドエルスフィールドで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Thornhill(은)는 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른힐에서 Richard de Thornhill의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1227년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른힐에서 Olivia Mare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1249년 영국 요르크실르 허더스필드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John de Thornhill nasceu em 1180, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Richard de Thornhill. Ele casou-se com Olivia Mare em 1227, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1249, em Huddersfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John de Thornhill родился в 1180 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Richard de Thornhill. Он женился на женщине по имени Olivia Mare в 1227 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1249 г. в местности худдирсфиелд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John de Thornhill nació en 1180, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Richard de Thornhill. Se casó con Olivia Mare en 1227, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1249, en Huddersfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
